General.Name: Rougier S.A.
General.Description: Rougier S.A., together with its subsidiaries, produces and trades timber products in France and internationally. The company offers logs, dimensional wood products, plywood, glued-laminated timber, and lumber. Rougier S.A. was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Niort, France.

1.Name: Mr. Philippe  Jean
1.Title: Purchasing Director and Director of Cameroon & Congo Operations
